answers.contents: 英特尔已经是过去时了。丫只能卖卖电脑芯片，而且这块业务也在被超微快速蚕食，泛不起什么浪花。再过几年估计就要沦落到靠骗政府补贴活着了。

Intel has survived an effort to halt hundreds of millions of dollars' worth of chip sales to Huawei, two people familiar with the matter said


信源是路透社说的两个相关人员透露，然后这条新闻被中共的环球时报转了

https://www.globaltimes. cn › page › 202403 › 1308769.shtml
US chip firms urge Biden administration to approve sales to China as ...
Intel has reportedly secured a license to continue to sell to Huawei amid an intensified US crackdown on the Chinese chip industry, according to media reports on Tuesday


不过比起这个，我更在意你上次转载的J10C的假新闻后续如何？

如何评价关于巴基斯坦歼10C参加军演并击败卡塔尔台风的新闻？ - 新·品葱
